title: Checksum (CRC)
text: Checksum (CRC) Determines whether the crc data processing attribute is added for the selected entity node in the DTD tree. CRC checksum values are produced by Uniface when loading data from a database, or when creating or loading data from XML streams. Valid values are True or False (default). Description CRC checksum values are required for disconnected record sets. They are used by retrieve/reconnect to determine if an occurrence can be updated by an XML stream. The occurrence CRC checksum can be set or inspected using $occcrc . If Disconnected Record Set is True , Status is also set to True . Applies To DTD Entity Related Links $occcrc Set or return the CRC checksum of an occurrence. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
